summary: Found 26 reusable assets: 5 direct, 4 adaptable, 17 reference-only. Types: 7 skills, 5 agent-templates, 1 MCP server, 6 shared-includes, 7 tools. Scanned ~75 total assets across shared/skills, shared/agent-includes, shared/mcp-servers, shared/hooks, .github/skills, profiles, and exemplar agents. The fractal orchestrator exemplar family (35 agents) is the primary architectural reference. The agent-as-function-contract and rules includes are directly reusable. Most domain-specific skills (Xperience, ADO, CodeGraph, Playwright) are irrelevant — the fantasy-writer domain needs entirely novel craft knowledge skills.
